What We Do

Microsoft Power Platform & DX Services

End-to-end digital transformation consulting and development, specializing in the Microsoft ecosystem and AI-driven automation.

Power Automate & Automation

Cloud-based workflow automation using Power Automate, plus desktop automation with Power Automate Desktop and UiPath RPA solutions.

Power AutomatePADUiPathRPA

Power Apps Development

Custom business application development using Power Apps — canvas and model-driven apps built to meet your specific operational needs.

Canvas AppsModel-DrivenDataverse

Copilot Studio & M365 Agents

Design and build intelligent AI agents with Microsoft Copilot Studio and M365 Copilot. Consultant and developer expertise for enterprise-grade virtual assistants.

Copilot StudioM365 CopilotAI Agents

Advanced AI Agents (Azure)

Build sophisticated multi-agent systems and AI-powered applications leveraging Azure AI Foundry and Azure AI Services for enterprise use cases.

Azure AI FoundryAzure AI ServicesGenAI

SharePoint & M365 Integration

Seamlessly connect SharePoint, Teams, Excel, and the full M365 suite into unified, intelligent digital workspaces for your organization.

SharePointTeamsM365

DX Consulting

Strategic digital transformation consulting — from process analysis and solution design to implementation and training, helping businesses modernize with Microsoft technology.

StrategyImplementationTraining
Custom AI Web Services

Cutting-Edge AI, Built for You

Beyond the Microsoft ecosystem, we engineer bespoke web services powered by the latest AI technologies — tailored to solve real business problems at scale.

We design and develop custom AI-powered web applications leveraging state-of-the-art generative AI, computer vision, and machine learning models — helping businesses unlock new efficiencies and user experiences that weren't possible before.

Our approach combines deep technical expertise with practical business sense — so every AI solution is not just technically impressive, but genuinely useful and impactful.

About the Founder

TIRMARE OMKAR

Founder & Principal Consultant — SoloDx Solutions

With deep expertise across the Microsoft Power Platform ecosystem and next-generation AI technologies, Omkar founded SoloDx Solutions to help businesses of all sizes unlock the true potential of digital transformation.

From hands-on Power Automate flow building and Copilot Studio agent design to advanced Azure AI architectures, Omkar brings a consultant's strategic perspective combined with a developer's technical precision to every engagement.
